JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER-CLERK, REPORTER WAIVED: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL: PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT GIVE BRIEF OPENING STATEMENTS, THEN PRESENT THEIR CASE. NO EVIDENCE IS ADMITTED, NO TESTIMONY IS GIVEN BY WITNESSES. CASE IS SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT ABOUATA, MICHAEL, INDV. DBA SNACK STATION DELI ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $8,351.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,351.50, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET ITS BURDEN IN PROVING DEFT. MICHAEL ABOUATA IS OBLIGATED TO PAY FOR ANY INDEBTEDNESS INCURRED BY MAHMOD T. YAQUB TO BERKELEY FARMS.(JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST MAHMOD T. YAQUB FOR $2270.45, AND COSTS PER COST BILL.
